---
title: "Cordelia Yonge"
---

## Cordelia Yonge

**Dates:** (1829/30-1886)

**Maiden name:** (Hay)

### Description

wife of John Bargus Yonge

### Biography

The daughter of William Hay of Duns Castle and Mary Garstin, she was connected to the Puslinch Yonges, her mother being a first cousin of Lord Seaton, Cordelia (Colborne) Yonge and Alethea Henrietta (Bargus) Yonge.  She married (28 June 1848) John Bargus Yonge of Puslinch (1821-1863). [LGI 1914 Garstin of Braganstown]

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from March 22d [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
